projectDescription: A usability-first Hyprland dotfiles suite featuring a custom Material Design 3 shell built with Quickshell, complete with AI integration, theming, and a transparent installation system.
keyFeatures: Material Design 3 theming with automatic wallpaper-based color generation via matugen
Custom Quickshell-based graphical shell (status bar, sidebars, overview, dock)
AI sidebar supporting Gemini, OpenAI-compatible APIs, and local Ollama models
Screen utilities: OCR/text recognition, Google Lens integration, screen translation, color picker
Transparent installation system with idempotent setup script for Arch/Fedora/Gentoo/NixOS
Workspace overview with live window previews
Notification center with rich notification support
Anti-flashbang display protection and night light scheduling
Pomodoro timer, clipboard history, emoji picker, music recognition
publicApiSurface: ./setup exp-update — experimental update without full reinstall
./setup exp-merge — merge upstream changes with local configs
qs -c ii — launch the Quickshell shell config
qs -c ii ipc call <target> <function> — IPC calls to shell services
